allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\('c:/Users/B4TTL/musicportfolio/config.json'\); console.log\('Track count:', c.tracks.length\); console.log\('First track:', c.tracks[0].title, '| isNew:', c.tracks[0].isNew, '| isFeatured:', c.tracks[0].isFeatured\); console.log\('Track 4:', c.tracks[4].title, '| isNew:', c.tracks[4].isNew, '| isFeatured:', c.tracks[4].isFeatured\); console.log\('Track 7:', c.tracks[7].title, '| isFeatured:', c.tracks[7].isFeatured\); console.log\('Track 13:', c.tracks[13].title, '| isFeatured:', c.tracks[13].isFeatured\); console.log\('Track 27:', c.tracks[27].title, '| isFeatured:', c.tracks[27].isFeatured\); console.log\('Last track:', c.tracks[c.tracks.length-1].title\); const tagged = c.tracks.filter\(t => t.tags.length > 0\); console.log\('Tagged tracks:', tagged.length\); const newTracks = c.tracks.filter\(t => t.isNew\); console.log\('New tracks:', newTracks.map\(t => t.title\)\); const featured = c.tracks.filter\(t => t.isFeatured\); console.log\('Featured tracks:', featured.map\(t => t.title\)\);")
